description: Hashes of the training-pitch sets used to fit each non-corpus artifact consumed by the validation study. The leakage audit (server/fund/services/leakage_audit.py) verifies that no holdout pitch_id appears in the recorded training_pitch_ids of any artifact listed here. This file is updated manually by the operator whenever an artifact is recomputed; CI verifies on-disk artifact hashes match the registered values.

training_artifacts.notes: Contradiction-direction unit vector ĉ used by the embedding layer. Recomputed only on the training partition (pre-2020). Hash covers a sorted, newline-joined list of training pitch_ids.
Anti-gaming template phrases mined from the training partition. Holdout pitches MUST NOT appear in training_pitch_ids.
Per-bin reliability calibration learned on the training partition; consumed by uncertainty_calibration.py.
